headline: Congress hits pause with pro forma sessions as Senate sets up judicial confirmations for Monday.

senate.lastSessionSummary: The Senate met briefly in pro forma session on July 9, lasting just 30 seconds before adjourning until Monday. No legislative business was conducted.

onTheFloor.title: United States Circuit Judge for the Second Circuit
United States District Judge for the Southern District of Texas
onTheFloor.status: confirmation vote scheduled for 5:30 PM Monday

house.lastSessionSummary: The House convened briefly on July 9 for just 3 minutes, introducing 39 public bills and 3 resolutions, including measures on ALS therapy access, family travel improvements, and aviation security. Six bills were reported out of committee with amendments.

onTheFloor.title: Sunshine Protection Act of 2025 - permanent daylight saving time
National Security, Department of State, and Related Programs Appropriations Act, 2027
Take Care of America's Veterans Act
Amend Accelerating Access to Critical Therapies for ALS Act through fiscal 2031
Establish IMPROVE Initiative within National Institutes of Health
Establish funds for investments in aviation security

committees.topic: hearing on Sunshine Protection Act, appropriations rule markup, Veterans Act rule markup, and Privacy in Purchases Act rule markup

committees.committee: Committee on Veterans' Affairs, Subcommittee on Technology Modernization
committees.topic: PACT Act Implementation: Modernizing VA Disability Claims Through Effective Technology
